(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EXTRA SPACE STORAGE, INC., EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT, INC., STORAGE TREASURES LLC's Motion To Appoint Discovery Referee And Request For A Protective Order.

Defendants' motion to appoint discovery referee and for a protective order is granted in substantial part. The court will appoint a discovery referee due to the extraordinary number of discovery disputes in this case and all fees of the discovery referee will be paid by defendants per their agreement to do so. The discovery referee is empowered to: 1) resolve all discovery disputes between the parties; 2) require the submission to him or her of discovery plans for his/her approval; 3) preclude any discovery not propounded or taken per a pre-approved discovery plan. All discovery and discovery motions are stayed pending the appointment of the discovery referee and an initial hearing with the discovery referee. If the parties cannot agree on the person to serve as their discovery referee, per Code of Civil Procedure 640(b), no later than May 15, 2018, each side shall submit the names of up to three people whom he or they believe are qualified to serve as a discovery referee and the hearing on this motion will be continued to May 17, 2018 for the court to announce which of the nominees will be selected as the parties' discovery referee.
